arts.ttl: Plymouth Argyle boss has already told Hull City what to expect in relegation six-pointer
arts.sum: Miron Muslic has challenged his Plymouth Argyle players to show the level of courage and spirit they did at Manchester City on Saturday night in their remaining 12 games, starting against Hull City tomorrow night. They are three points behind City, who have won just twice at home this season, while the Pilgrims are yet to win on the road in the second tier.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola blames the FA Cup BALL for Man City's striking woes against Plymouth despite win - echoing Mikel Arteta's frustrations this season
arts.sum: NATHAN SALT: Pep Guardiola hit out at the FA Cup ball and suggested that it is not fit for purpose following Manchester City's come-from-behind win against Championship side Plymouth Argyle.

arts.ttl: Teenager O'Reilly scores twice as Man City fight back to beat Plymouth
arts.sum: Nico O'Reilly scores twice as Manchester City come from behind to beat Championship side Plymouth 3-1 in the 5th round of the FA Cup at Etihad Stadium.

Ruben Selles will be desperate for a positive result against Plymouth this weekend after watching his side lose 1-0 to relegation rivals Cardiff last time out. Hull have won just two of their 17 home ...
